mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, image_url AS imageUrl, category_id AS categoryId, price, stock, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM products WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, name, description, sort, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM category ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT id, name, description, image_url AS imageUrl, category_id AS categoryId, price, stock, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
